qa_pairs.question: Which tracks that have related invoiceline, playlisttrack, and mediatype records have a name exactly equal to 'Gatas Extraordinárias', a duration of at least 212506 milliseconds, a size of at most 7095702 bytes, a unit price exactly equal to 0.99, are associated with a mediatype named 'MPEG audio file', have invoicelines with a quantity of at least 1 and a unit price exactly equal to 0.99?

JOIN invoiceline ON track.trackid = invoiceline.trackid
JOIN playlisttrack ON track.trackid = playlisttrack.trackid
JOIN mediatype ON track.mediatypeid = mediatype.mediatypeid
